suite.name: Auth Suites

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=30, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: Cenario 1: Autenticação com credenciais válidas deve retornar token

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth path_url=/auth headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "admin", "password": "password123"}'

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Então o status da resposta deve ser 200
kw.source_name: Então o status da resposta deve ser ${status}

kw.name: E o status da resposta deve ser ${status}
kw.source_name: E o status da resposta deve ser ${status}

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: E o corpo da resposta deve conter o campo token
Convert String To Json
kw.doc: Convert String to JSON object

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: E o token retornado não deve estar vazio
E o corpo da resposta deve conter o campo token

kw.doc: Convert String to JSON object

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

test.doc: Valida que POST /auth com credenciais válidas retorna token válido.

test.name: Cenario 2: Autenticação com senha incorreta deve retornar mensagem de erro

suite.doc: Testes de autenticação básica da API Restful Booker. Valida geração de token, rejeição de credenciais inválidas e comportamentos com dados ausentes.

suite.name: Booking Suites

kw.name: Post Request
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Post Request' is deprecated. Please use `POST On Session` instead.

POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking path_url=/booking headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '132', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"lastname": "Doe", "totalprice": "123", "depositpaid": "True", "bookingdates": {"checkin": "2025-01-01", "checkout": "2025-01-05"}}'

POST Response : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking status=500, reason=Internal Server Error headers={'Content-Length': '21', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', 'Date': 'Tue, 02 Jun 2026 02:46:22 GMT', 'Etag': 'W/"15-/6VXivhc2MKdLfIkLcUE47K6aH0"', 'Nel': '{"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1}', 'Report-To': '{"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=YlaHOkAS1vmm7dgz3QQGhK4jNkyOHQkcnpEGalm0p%2FA%3D\\u0026sid=c46efe9b-d3d2-4a0c-8c76-bfafa16c5add\\u0026ts=1780368382"}],"max_age":3600}', 'Reporting-Endpoints': 'heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=YlaHOkAS1vmm7dgz3QQGhK4jNkyOHQkcnpEGalm0p%2FA%3D&sid=c46efe9b-d3d2-4a0c-8c76-bfafa16c5add&ts=1780368382"', 'Server': 'Heroku', 'Via': '1.1 heroku-router', 'X-Powered-By': 'Express'} body=Internal Server Error

C:\Users\Dione\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'restful-booker.herokuapp.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED* Please use `POST On Session` instead.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Então o status da resposta deve ser 500
kw.source_name: Então o status da resposta deve ser ${status}

kw.name: E o status da resposta deve ser ${status}
kw.source_name: E o status da resposta deve ser ${status}

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Cria uma reserva sem firstname e valida tratamento de payload obrigatório.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

suite.doc: Suites básicas de CRUD e validações de reservas.

errors.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Post Request' is deprecated. Please use `POST On Session` instead.
